---
title: "Palabras clave**"
subtitle: "Investigaciones en gestión del riesgo de desastres para Colombia"
author: "UNGRD"
date: "2021"
title-block-banner: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?q=80&w=2072"
---

# **Palabras clave**


Reasentamiento social, acompañamiento psicosocial, reducción del riesgo de desastres, integridad socio-ambiental, sostenibilidad

**Performative notions of social resettlement as disaster risk reduction in Colombia: strategic psychosocial components for sustainability**
